A C D G I P R S T U W 

S

SecurityProfile - Class in com._1c.v8.ibis.admin
Description of a security profile of a 1C:Enterprise cluster
SecurityProfile() - Constructor for class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.SecurityProfile

Description of an allowed add-in of a security profile of a 1C:Enterprise cluster

Sets allowed deviation for the number of server errors per query per minute based on the average value for all processes.

setClusterRecyclingKillByMemoryWithDump(boolean) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IClusterInfo
Enforces creation of memory dump of processes, which are killed for exceeding memory limit.

setClusterRecyclingKillProblemProcesses(boolean) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IClusterInfo
Enforces termination of processes with errors.

setPermissionCode(String) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IInfoBaseInfo

Sets the physical URL of a virtual directory

setPort(int) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ISecurityProfileInternetResource

setPriority(int) - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.AssignmentRuleInfo
 
setPriority(int) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAssignmentRuleInfo
Sets assignment rule priority
setPrivilegedModeInSafeModeAllowed(boolean) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ISecurityProfile
Sets the value of the flag that shows whether enabling privileged mode in safe mode is allowed
setPrivilegedModeInSafeModeAllowed(boolean) - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.SecurityProfile
 
setPrivilegedModeRoles(String) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ISecurityProfile
Sets list of roles used in privileged mode if full privileged mode is not allowed
setPrivilegedModeRoles(String) - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.SecurityProfile
 
setProtocol(String) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ISecurityProfileInternetResource
Sets the Internet resource access protocol
setProtocol(String) - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.SecurityProfileInternetResource

Sets limit value of the session disk read operations
setReadBytes(long) - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ResourceConsumptionLimit
 
setReserveWorkingProcesses(boolean) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IInfoBaseInfo
Sets the flag that shows whether server should create reverve working processes for infobase
setReserveWorkingProcesses(boolean) - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.InfoBaseInfo
 
setRightExtension(boolean) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ISecurityProfile
Sets the value of the flag that allows every right extension
setRightExtension(boolean) - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.SecurityProfile
 
setRightExtensionDefinitionRoles(String) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ISecurityProfile
Sets list of extensible rights defining roles
setRightExtensionDefinitionRoles(String) - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.SecurityProfile
 
setRuleType(int) - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.AssignmentRuleInfo
 
setRuleType(int) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAssignmentRuleInfo
Sets an assignment rule 0 - do not distribute to this server 1 - same as no rule 2 - distribute to this server
setSafeCallMemoryLimit(long) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IWorkingServerInfo
Sets the safe memory size limit per call (in bytes)
setSafeCallMemoryLimit(long) - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.WorkingServerInfo
 
setSafeModeProfile(boolean) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ISecurityProfile
Sets the value of the flag that shows whether using a script profile in safe mode is allowed
setSafeModeProfile(boolean) - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.SecurityProfile
 
setSafeModeSecurityProfileName(String) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IInfoBaseInfo
Sets the name of the infobase security profile for safe mode
setSafeModeSecurityProfileName(String) - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.InfoBaseInfo
 
setSafeWorkingProcessesMemoryLimit(long) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IWorkingServerInfo
Sets the safe memory size limit per working process on a server
setSafeWorkingProcessesMemoryLimit(long) - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.WorkingServerInfo
 
setScheduledJobsDenied(boolean) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IInfoBaseInfo
Sets the flag that shows whether execution of infobase scheduled jobs is denied
setScheduledJobsDenied(boolean) - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.InfoBaseInfo
 
setSecurityLevel(int) - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ClusterInfo

setTemporaryAllowedProcessesTotalMemory(long) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IWorkingServerInfo
Sets the temporary allowed memory size of working processes and cluster managers on work server

setTemporaryAllowedProcessesTotalMemoryTimeLimit(long) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IWorkingServerInfo
Gets the maximum time for working processes and cluster managers to excess temporary allowed memory size.
setTemporaryAllowedProcessesTotalMemoryTimeLimit(long) - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.WorkingServerInfo
 
setUnsafeExternalModuleFullAccess(boolean) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ISecurityProfile
Sets the value of the flag that shows whether using arbitrary unsafe external modules is allowed
setUnsafeExternalModuleFullAccess(boolean) - Method in class com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.SecurityProfile

shutdown() - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.client.IAgentAdminConnector
Shuts down the object that is used for establishing connections, and releases the resources.
